creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Pedro F. Giffuni from comment #1)

Hi Pedro,


please check portlint -AC:

% portlint -AC
[.]
WARN: Makefile: LIB_DEPENDS don't specify the ABI version number .8 in libmpich.so.8 unless it is really necessary.
WARN: Makefile: LIB_DEPENDS the new format is libFOO.so (e.g., liblibmpich.so.8.so).

I will fix this for you :-)
